title: Visit the UK as a national of Trinidad and Tobago
body: "Nationals of Trinidad and Tobago must now apply for a visa to visit the UK.  If you had an ETA, it has been cancelled.  If you are already in the UK with an ETA, you can stay for up to 6 months. You must follow the rules on what you can and cannot do with an ETA.  "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
